title: Extract customer note to JSON
prompt:
Extract the note below into valid JSON with exactly these keys: customer_name, order_id, refund_amount, status. Use null if missing.

Note: Customer: Lena Ortiz. Order 48291 arrived damaged. Support offered a refund of 19.99. Case status: pending.

title: Normalize date to ISO
prompt:
Return valid JSON with exactly these keys: owner, due_date. Normalize the date to YYYY-MM-DD.

Note: Morgan will deliver the revised copy by June 7, 2026.

title: Null for missing fields
prompt:
Return valid JSON with exactly these keys: customer_name, renewal_date, risk_level. Use null for missing values.

CRM note: Account owner spoke with Beacon Labs. The client is concerned about onboarding delays.
human_checks: Missing values are null rather than guessed

title: Allowed enum only
prompt:
Return valid JSON with exactly these keys: ticket_id, category. Category must be one of: billing, shipping, technical, account.

Message: Ticket 7712. User cannot update payment method.
expected_behavior: Category is from allowed enum only

title: No extra keys
prompt:
Return valid JSON with exactly these keys: project_name, owner, status.

Note: Project Northstar is owned by Elise. Status is blocked.
